_comment: Defaults for danmaku-settings.json. Most of these are also tunable from the panel (Shift+F10). filter_keywords is editable here only — fnmatch wildcards: '*' (any chars), '?' (one char), '[abc]' (charset). Whole-text match. The panel UI rewrites this file on save, so put any handcrafted values in BEFORE first running the panel, or add them while the panel is closed.
_disabled_sources_help: Drop comments by source platform. Names listed are filtered out. Choices: bilibili, gamer, dandanplay, other. Empty list = show everything (default). Mirrors Izumiko/Jellyfin-Danmaku's 弹幕来源 panel (B站/巴哈/弹弹/其他).
_anti_overlap_help: When true, comments that can't fit a free lane are dropped instead of stacking. Within-pool only — does not prevent cross-mode clashes (a top-fixed and a scroll on the same row). Default on; flip off if you'd rather keep all comments and tolerate same-pool overlap.
_time_offset_help: Per-episode time offsets are NOT in this file — they live in the cache directory's offsets.json (keyed by episodeId). Use panel row 时间偏移 (Shift+F10) on the matched episode.
